_attribution: LA FORJA team (Manuel Peña Zúñiga). Original item authored by the team.
stem: A fair coin is tossed three times in a row. What is the probability of getting exactly two heads?
author_rationale: Equiprobable space of 2^3 = 8 sequences; the favorable ones are HHT, HTH and THH, that is 3. P = 3/8. Distractors: 1/8 corresponds to fixing one specific sequence, 1/2 to naive symmetry, and 1/4 to counting only two favorable sequences.
